title: The Winsford Academy (Winsford): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: The Winsford Academy  URN: 136184  Notice issued to: Halliard Trust  Reason for issue: ‘Requires significant improvement’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Vicky Beer  DfE regional director office: North West  Local authority: Cheshire West and Chester "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
